title: Tootsies & the Fake
original_title: ตุ๊ดซี่ส์ แอนด์ เดอะเฟค
overview: After knocking a celebrity unconscious before a huge job, a bumbling pack of pals tries to avoid a lawsuit by replacing her with a look-alike.
